title: 10 best herbal teas for bladder infection
intro_desc: Herbal teas for bladder infection are natural remedies derived from various plants, helping to alleviate symptoms and prevent infection recurrence by promoting urine flow, reducing inflammation, and combating bacterial growth. The best herbal teas for bladder infection include Juniperus communis, Arctostaphylos uva-ursi, Berberis vulgaris, Equisetum arvense, Vaccinium macrocarpon, Echinacea purpurea, Taraxacum officinale, Arctium lappa, Solidago virgaurea, and Achillea millefolium. If left untreated, bladder infections can lead to severe complications, causing painful urination, frequent trips to the bathroom, and even kidney damage, significantly impacting daily life and overall well-being.
